title: Recovery after cesarean birth
excerpt: Hospital recovery, first week at home, gentle movement, and incision warning signs — follow your surgical team first.
content:
## First day in hospital

Pain control, early walking when cleared, and catheter removal per protocol. Support the incision when coughing or laughing.

## First week at home

Rest, avoid lifting heavy loads, keep incision clean and dry. Nutritious meals and hydration aid healing.

## Movement

Short walks increase circulation; avoid strenuous core work until cleared.

## Call your doctor if

Fever, spreading redness, foul discharge, worsening pain, or heavy bleeding.
